# Adrian Marikar

> Practical build logs and notes on software, systems, self-hosted infrastructure, automation, product experiments, and independent internet projects.

## Site

- Homepage: https://adrianmarikar.com/
- RSS feed: https://adrianmarikar.com/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://adrianmarikar.com/sitemap.xml

## Current posts and categories

|- Bitcoin Bottom Signal: Building an Evidence-First BTC Cycle Dashboard: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/bitcoin-bottom-signal-dashboard-build-log.html
  - Detailed build log for bitcoin.adrianmarikar.com covering live BTC price context, conservative bottom scoring, reliability tracking, live proof, strategy backtests, diagnostics, mobile dashboard UX, and no-secret deployment discipline.
|- Coolify Docker Compose Volumes and Healthchecks Before You Deploy a Database App: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/coolify-docker-compose-volumes-healthchecks.html
  - Practical checklist for stateful Coolify Compose apps: persistent volumes, database readiness, healthchecks, backups, restores, migrations, and production verification.
|- CAA Records for Self-Hosted Sites: Let Let’s Encrypt and Cloudflare Issue Certificates Without Surprises: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/caa-records-letsencrypt-cloudflare-coolify.html
  - Practical CAA record checklist for self-hosted VPS, Coolify, Cloudflare, Let’s Encrypt, mail TLS, and safe certificate-renewal verification.
|- Setting Up a Hetzner VPS for Self-Hosting: From Bare Metal to Docker in 30 Minutes: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/hetzner-vps-setup-self-hosting.html
  - A practical walkthrough of provisioning a Hetzner Cloud VPS, choosing the right plan, initial hardening, installing Docker, and running a first self-hosted container.
|- Cloudflare Tunnel for Self-Hosted VPS Apps: Expose Services Without Opening Ports: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/cloudflare-tunnel-self-hosted-vps.html
  - A practical guide to setting up Cloudflare Tunnel (cloudflared) on a VPS to expose self-hosted apps, admin panels, and web services without opening inbound firewall ports. Covers Docker setup, ingress rules, TLS, websocket paths, and common pitfalls.
|- GitHub Actions CI/CD for Docker Builds and Coolify Deploys: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/github-actions-docker-build-coolify-deploy.html
  - A practical guide to building Docker images with GitHub Actions, pushing to GHCR, and triggering a Coolify redeploy via webhook for self-hosted apps on a VPS.
|- A Practical VPS Hardening Checklist for Self-Hosted Apps
  - An ordered VPS hardening checklist: non-root sudo user, SSH key-only logins, UFW firewall, fail2ban, unattended security upgrades, swap, sysctl tuning, loopback-bound admin services, and tested backups.
- IndexNow for Static Sites: Submit New Posts After a Coolify Deploy: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/indexnow-static-site-coolify.html
  - Practical workflow for static HTML discovery pings after GitHub, Coolify, RSS, sitemap, live-page, and key-file verification.
- Cloudflare DNS for Self-Hosted Coolify Apps: Proxy Web, Protect Mail, Avoid Origin Leaks: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/cloudflare-dns-coolify-origin-checklist.html
  - Practical checklist for connecting self-hosted Coolify apps through Cloudflare DNS, choosing proxied versus DNS-only records, avoiding origin leaks, and keeping mail records safe.
- NewBizFeed category: https://adrianmarikar.com/categories/newbizfeed.html
  - Focused archive for NewBizFeed build notes covering public company-register data, Companies House and CRO workflows, Codex review lanes, source attribution, and lead-feed automation.
- Dry Home Advice category: https://adrianmarikar.com/categories/dryhomeadvice.html
  - Focused archive for dryhomeadvice.co.uk build notes covering dehumidifier buyer-intent content, analytics, indexing, affiliate-link checks, and practical long-tail SEO experiments.
- Using Multiple Codex Agents to Review Companies House and CRO Data: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/newbizfeed-codex-company-register-review.html
  - Build log on NewBizFeed's parallel Codex discovery/review lanes for Companies House and CRO public-register data, source-attributed lead enrichment, and deterministic publish gates.
- Coolify Static Site Deploy Checklist: GitHub to Nginx Without Stale CSS: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/coolify-static-site-deploy-checklist.html
  - A practical GitHub-to-Coolify-to-nginx deploy checklist for static HTML sites, cache-busted CSS, Docker builds, RSS, sitemap, live verification, and safe public hygiene scans.
- Horse Racing Tips Research category: https://adrianmarikar.com/categories/horse-racing-tips-research.html
  - RailSideRatings-focused archive covering UK and Ireland horse racing tips research, paper tracking, Betfair validation, and transparent evidence standards.
- The RailSide Ratings Evidence Ladder: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/railside-ratings-evidence-ladder.html
  - Research-method note explaining the evidence ladder: real racecards, transparent scoring, price-source validation, paper tracking, and promotion guardrails.
- Why RaceEdge Became RailSide Ratings: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/raceedge-to-railsideratings-name-change.html
  - Naming note explaining why the racing research project moved to RailSide Ratings and railsideratings.co.uk.
- Horse Racing Tips Research: What RaceEdge Has Learned So Far: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/horse-racing-tips-research-raceedge.html
  - A research update on RaceEdge's evidence so far: cross-source lay slices, blocked proxy model-lay results, live paper tracking, and why signals remain research-only.
- Privacy-Friendly Nginx Log Analytics for a Static Blog: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/privacy-friendly-nginx-log-analytics.html
  - Measuring real unique visitors on a static nginx blog with SQLite, salted hashes, bot filtering, no cookies, and no stored raw IPs.
- Docker Mailserver Multi-Domain Setup Without Breaking Existing Mail: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/docker-mailserver-multiple-domains.html
  - A practical checklist for adding a second domain to Docker Mailserver while preserving PTR/rDNS, DKIM, TLS, and existing mailboxes.
- How Email Is Handled on This VPS: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/self-hosted-email-on-the-vps.html
  - Docker Mailserver, multi-domain self-hosted email, SPF, DKIM, DMARC, Let’s Encrypt, and terminal email workflows.
- How This Blog Is Built and Maintained: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/how-this-blog-is-built-and-maintained.html
  - Static HTML/CSS, GitHub, Docker, nginx, Coolify, Cloudflare, RSS, sitemap, and Hermes maintenance workflow.
- RaceEdge: Building a Transparent UK & Ireland Racing Research App: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/raceedge-transparent-racing-app.html
  - A build log for railsideratings.co.uk, transparent racing research, explainable scoring, paper tracking, and Coolify deployment.
- My AI App Factory: Hetzner, Hermes, Coolify, GitHub, Cloudflare, and Telegram: https://adrianmarikar.com/posts/ai-app-factory-vps-hermes-coolify.html
  - Using a VPS, Hermes agents, Coolify, GitHub, Cloudflare, and Telegram to ship apps with AI.

## Author

Adrian Marikar writes about practical technology, automation, self-hosted systems, internet businesses, product experiments, and turning rough ideas into shipped work.
